flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of the Canyons rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of the Canyons rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $11.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College of the Canyons rose 211% between 2007 and 2010 (6.9k → 21.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of the Canyons fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
